title: DSPT x Data Makers Fest - A Vibe Coding Party
description:
**Data Science Portugal (DSPT)** is teaming up with **Data Makers Fest** for a special warm-up event ahead of the conference: a **Vibe Coding Party** focused on **creativity**, **GenAI**, and **development with code agents**.

This event is for people who enjoy building things, experimenting with new tools, and solving real problems in creative ways 💡

**🧠 What’s going to happen?**

Over the course of a full day, participants will:
• Take part in a **hands-on workshop** on **Vibe Coding** and **code agents**
• Work in teams to tackle a **practical AI / Data Science challenge**
• Use **GenAI tools** to speed up development and explore creative approaches
• **Pitch** their final solution in a short presentation
• **Vote** for the winning project 🎉

**🏆 The winning team will receive tickets to Data Makers Fest!**

**👥 Who is this event for?**

You don’t need prior experience with GenAI tools or vibe coding. Curiosity and a willingness to experiment are the most important requirements 💪

You can:
• Sign up with friends in **teams of 2–3 people**, or
• **Join on your own**, and we’ll help you form a team on the day.

**🗓️ Agenda**
• 10:45 — Check-in & welcome
• 11:00 — Vibe Coding Workshop
• 12:30 — Lunch & networking + team formation
• 13:45 — Challenge and tools presentation
• 14:00 — Team development session
• 17:00 — Project pitches
• 18:00 — Public vote & winner announcement

**📌 Spots are limited** — secure your place, join us for this Vibe Coding Party, and get a chance to win tickets to one of the coolest AI conferences around!
